paragraphs.text: Hello. My name is Paul Herrera, a Software Developer since 2019, and a resourceful high-quality builder since the age of 13.

sections.title: Seeking for professional internship positions that prioritize execution

paragraphs.text: Your company and I will collaborate through a hard-working and execution-focused relationship. As a self-taught developer with freelancing background, I'm building professional technical experience beyond academic theory while delivering practical results based on years of real-world development.

items.name: FB Ads Manager, FB Business Manager
The ability to dive into a problem and figure out how to solve it

portfolio.title: Portfolio

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about working with me

items.name: Ricardo Ruiz
items.text: The expertise demonstrated by Santiago Paul in our school led us to open a volunteer internship program for each year due to his youth energy in providing enterprise solutions.

items.name: Jose Javier
items.text: Met him at 17 years of age, rapidly got my attention to continue insourcing his services of marketing, got more real-life experience than any local marketing undergraduate.

items.name: Wendy Maribel
items.text: Super kind and young hard hustler, handled our marketing with results, fast and cheap replies, confident and easy to work with.

timeline.title: Formal Education & Work experience
timeline.subtitle: My journey through learning and professional growth

items.title: Self Taught software development
items.subtitle: at Discord servers
keytakes: Started in 2019, at 13 years old
Mastered english for docs understanding
Learnt to code with NodeJs & JavaScript later TS as a hobby for automation production within our active users in the community
Expanded communities via automations & engagement from 4 to 6 figures in recurring users

Inactive mid-2022 post pandemic while reconnecting socially in high school, stepped out at 2023 beginnings, choosing to not take any major role during that inactivity period, left sustainable systems for our new developers

items.title: Bachillerato Técnico Informática
items.subtitle: at Liceo Los Delfines
items.description: From introvert developer to social problem-solver
keytakes: 'Founders' scholarship with a % discounted from the price
Detected system flaws within the academic platform and worked along with the staff to solve them as student
Assisted multiple teachers with technical troubleshooting during class sessions; reconfigured IPv4 dns ports to resolve unstable crossport interference.
Assisted with the early production of podcasts and audio production for the company
Later got an internship as the first student ever in the company

items.title: Internship
items.subtitle: at Liceo Los Delfines
keytakes: Made lot of cibersecurity enhancements
Veyon service implementation for security surveillance
Windows Server 2022 implementation for user data management
Miscellaneous work such as; cleaning digital projectors, connecting cameras for the new building within the campus, etc.

items.title: Built a Marketing Agency
items.subtitle: for Veterinarians and Dentists
items.description: Made mistakes, without formal education nor experience delivered great results, strengthen my purpose.
keytakes: Learnt everything about Meta Business Manager; pixel for ecommerce, ad accounts; quick look into Meta Developers API to planify a solution in my latest related project
Managed Meta Ads for Instagram and Facebook
Automated chats like in my early experience with Discord communities, using GoHighLevel with workflows automation to convert leads
Tried hundreds tools from Botpress, Zapier/Make, Calbell and switched from Marketing outsourcing to Chat Automation
Later my SaaS project is based in fully strict but really flexible Workflows

items.title: Enrolled in university
items.subtitle: at ESPOL (Ecuador #1 QS 2025)
keytakes: Enrolled for the pre-university preparation program, with a 1:10 approval rate (5 out of 50 per engineering course, most people repeat before passing)
Created an Anki Deck of mathematics from scratch zero within those months and taught struggling friends with spaced repetition logic
Passed with a 9.3/10 grade over a 6/10 minimum requirement at the first attempt

items.title: Eng. Data Science & Machine Learning
items.subtitle: at ESPOL (Ecuador #1 QS 2025)
keytakes: Passionated in coding, and theorical courses
Using time-saving tools like Anki to practice less with good grades to focus on my side projects

Gathering people with good sales and social skills, software masters in the courses languages, networking with teachers. Planning into outsourcing our whitelabel SaaS CRM for them to build agencies as students like me winning real experience before graduation.
